args:
set -eu
measure_dir=$(mktemp -d)
measure_out=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- measure distributed-flashinfer-startup --out "$measure_dir")
printf '%s' "$measure_out" | grep -q 'measurement intent=distributed_flashinfer_startup'
grep -q '"intent":"distributed_flashinfer_startup"' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"closure_outcome":"full_compile_closure"' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"reused_artifact_count":11' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
grep -q '"phase_timings":' "$measure_dir/measurement_report.json"
printf 'measured-distributed\n'
